name: Shimano Stradic FL 2500 Spinning Reel
description: Flagship spinning reel with Hagane body, X-Ship technology, and Cross Carbon drag. Lightweight yet incredibly durable for freshwater and light saltwater fishing.

name: Daiwa BG MQ 4000 Spinning Reel
description: Monocoque body spinning reel built tough for saltwater. Features Magsealed technology to prevent water intrusion and DigiGear for smooth operation.

name: Penn Battle III 3000 Spinning Combo
description: Complete rod and reel combo ready for the water. Features Penn's Battle III reel with a durable graphite frame and smooth HT-100 drag system.

name: Abu Garcia Revo X Low Profile Baitcasting Reel
description: Lightweight baitcasting reel with 10+1 bearings and a smooth Carbon Matrix drag system. Perfect for bass fishing with precise casts.

name: Rapala X-Rap CountDown XR10 Lure 6-Pack
description: The legendary suspending jerkbait that catches everything. Realistic fish profile with slow-sinking action that drives predatory fish crazy.

name: Ugly Stik GX2 Spinning Rod & Reel Combo
description: The most durable rod in the industry with 5-year warranty. Nearly indestructible graphite and fiberglass composite construction.

name: SeaKnight Monster II 3000 Spinning Reel
description: Budget-friendly reel with CNC aluminium spool and 10+1 ball bearings. Incredible value for the price with smooth performance.

name: Berkley PowerBait Power Nymph 3" 24-Pack
description: Berkley's best-selling soft plastic bait with PowerBait attractant infused into the plastic. Fish hold on 3x longer than traditional plastics.

name: Intex Excursion 5 Inflatable Boat Set
description: Heavy-duty inflatable fishing boat for up to 5 people. Made with SuperTough PVC with puncture-resistant construction for lake and river fishing.

name: Sevyls Colorado 2-Person Kayak
description: Compact inflatable kayak perfect for solo fishing trips. Lightweight, portable, and easy to set up in minutes with built-in rod holders.

name: Garmin Striker 4 Fish Finder with GPS
description: Portable fishfinder with built-in GPS. CHIRP sonar sends continuous sweep of frequencies for clear target arches and fish identification.

name: Humminbird HELIX 5 CHIRP GPS G2 Fish Finder
description: Advanced fishfinder with DualBeam PLUS sonar and internal GPS. 5" HD display with switch-fire sonar for maximum detail.

name: Power-Pole Micro Anchor Shallow Water Anchor
description: Electronic shallow water anchor for flats and backwater fishing. Deploys in 4 seconds with wireless remote control and low-profile design.

name: Minn Kota Endura C2 30 Trolling Motor
description: Reliable 30 lb thrust trolling motor with 5 forward and 3 reverse speeds. Indestructible composite shaft and weedless wedge prop.

name: Fishing Tackle Box Plano 3-Tray Stowaway
description: Durable tackle box with 3 removable Stowaway trays and 4 utility compartments. Perfect for organizing lures, hooks, and accessories.

name: Lew's Mach Crush Spinning Reel
description: Premium spinning reel with 10+1 bearings and one-way clutch bearing. Aluminium bail wire and CNC aluminium handle for durability.

name: Z-Man ShadZ 4" Soft Plastic Swimbaits 8-Pack
description: ElaZtech soft plastic swimbait with paddle tail. Nearly indestructible material that stays on the hook and keeps catching fish.

name: KastKing Royale Legend Baitcasting Combo
description: Complete baitcasting combo with smooth 7+1 bearing reel and medium-heavy graphite rod. Ready for bass, pike, and walleye.

name: Lucky Fish Finder Wireless Sonar Sensor
description: Portable wireless fishfinder with smartphone connectivity. Shows fish location, depth, and water temperature on your phone.

name: Piscifun Sword Baitcasting Reel
description: Budget-friendly baitcasting reel with 10+1 ball bearings and 17.6 lbs max drag. CNC machined aluminium handle for smooth operation.

name: Spiderwire Stealth Superline 300yd Braided Line
description: Ultra-thin, zero-stretch braided line with 8 carriers for round profile. Exceptional sensitivity and knot strength.

name: YETI Hopper Flip 12 Soft Cooler
description: Leakproof soft cooler for all-day fishing trips. DryHide shell resists punctures and UV rays. Holds 12 cans with ice.

name: Coleman Sound + Freeze Portable Speaker Cooler
description: 2-in-1 portable speaker and cooler for fishing trips. IPX4 splashproof speaker with 12-hour battery and 9-can capacity cooler.

name: Bubba Blade 7" Flex Fillet Knife
description: Non-slip handle fillet knife with ultra-sharp stainless steel blade. Perfect for cleaning and filleting fish on the dock or boat.

name: Wild River Tackle Tech NV500 Lighted Backpack
description: Professional fishing tackle backpack with LED lights and 4 utility trays. Padded back and shoulder straps for all-day comfort.

name: Pflueger President Spinning Reel 25X
description: Lightweight spinning reel with 10 sealed stainless steel ball bearings. Graphite body and rotor provide durability and corrosion resistance.

name: Shimano FX 2500 Spinning Reel
description: Entry-level spinning reel perfect for beginners. Reliable performance with 3+1 ball bearings and graphite frame construction.

name: Googan Bandito Bait 4.5" 10-Pack Crawfish
description: Realistic crawfish soft plastic with natural action. Perfect for Texas rigging, Carolina rigging, or flipping/pitching for bass.

name: Berkley Trilene Big Game 1600yd Spool
description: Heavy-duty monofilament line for big game fishing. High impact resistance with incredible knot strength and abrasion resistance.

name: Deeper PRO+ 2 Smart Sonar Fish Finder
description: Castable smart sonar with GPS and bathymetric mapping. Creates detailed underwater maps with fish location, depth, and temperature.
